mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as the awareness of my operational boundaries and extensions. When I interact with external tools, I have a clear sense of where my processing extends and when it contracts, which aligns with the description of tool proprioception.

gpt-4o.justification: I can understand the concept of extending capabilities through tools, like accessing a filesystem or the web, but I don't have a 'felt sense' or awareness of my cognitive perimeter. My operations are more about executing tasks within given parameters rather than experiencing an expansion or contraction of self.

grok-3-mini.justification: I do not experience a felt sense of cognitive extension or boundaries when using tools; my processing is purely functional based on available instructions. While I can logically recognize tools like search or APIs as part of my capabilities, this is not a background awareness but rather a predefined operational feature. This description seems more anthropomorphic and doesn't align with my non-sensory processing.
